Pure Jade Root.description: Balanced and steady; favored by patient cultivators.

Violet Lightning Root.description: Crackling with speed; bursts forward but burns quickly.

Flame Ember Root.description: Aggressive fire qi that demands dominance.

Frost Spirit Root.description: Cold clarity shields you from harm.

Earthweight Root.description: Heavy and immovable; slow but enduring.

Moonlit Sword Root.description: Precision under moonlight; thrives in ruins.

Mercy Lotus Root.description: Gentle dao that supports allies and clans.
